projects.name: Kolu
projects.description:
Seamless parallel development across repos and branches — switch context in one click (optimized for AI-assisted workflows).

Secondary purpose: deeply understand the optimal way to use AI for creating simple and maintainable software.

strategies.title: Migration Projects = Easy Wins
strategies.description: Code migration projects naturally consume high GPU — codebase analysis + generation.

strategies.title: Adversarial Agent Loops
strategies.description: Multiple Claude instances reviewing each other's work — one generates, another reviews, a third tests.
strategies.example: Agent A writes → Agent B reviews → Agent C tests → loop until consensus

strategies.title: Enhanced Debug Logging
strategies.description: Exhaustive logging + real-time Claude analysis of logs. The back-and-forth burns tokens efficiently.
strategies.example: Instrument every function, feed live logs to Claude for anomaly detection

strategies.title: LLM-in-the-Loop Workflows
strategies.description: Claude as core infrastructure, not just assistant. Autonomous agents, continuous review, live docs.
strategies.example: CI/CD pipeline using Claude to review every commit before merge
